title: Pack of 5 Gold Acrylic Cake Decoration Hearts Set - Wedding, Birthday, Anniversary & Valentine's Day Cake Toppers
features: Durable material: these cake toppers made of high quality acrylic are sturdy, safe and reusable. The mirrored gold surface is easy to clean, so you can enjoy it at multiple celebrations.
5 unique designs: each pack contains five different acrylic love heart cake decorations with elaborate and heartfelt designs that add a charming and romantic touch to your cakes and desserts.
Easy to use: simply insert the toppers into your cakes or desserts to instantly transform them into eye-catching creations. They can be used individually or in combination.

DIY cake decorations: brighten up your celebrations with these adorable acrylic cake accessories that add a touch of love to your desserts. Stand out with our personalised cake toppers with customizable elements.
Versatile occasions: ideal for weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, engagements, Valentine's Day and other special occasions to add a touch of romance and sophistication to your cake.
description: Description: This 5 piece cake decorating set is perfect for spreading love and enhancing the look of your cakes, cupcakes or other desserts for weddings, anniversaries, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day or any other sweet dessert party that should enhance your treats even more memorable. Features: - High-quality acrylic material. - Easy to use and assemble. - Five unique heart-shaped toppers. - Versatile for different occasions. - Great gift idea for family and friends Specifications: Material: acrylic. Colour: gold. Quantity: 5 pieces. Size: as shown in the picture. Package includes: 5 x cake decorations. Warm tips: The one-sided back is made of silver mirror. For decoration purposes only, not edible and please do not use in the oven or microwave. Customer service: We strive to provide you with excellent customer service. If you have any questions or concerns about our product, please contact our customer support team. We are here to help you in any way imaginable.
